overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing Batman standing on elevated railway tracks in an industrial district of Gotham City during a stormy night. The scene begins with detective vision mode active (green overlay) then transitions to normal vision as the character slowly walks along the tracks toward a large industrial complex with neon signage and construction cranes.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated railway track overlooking industrial district

events.description: detective vision mode deactivates, removing green overlay and returning to normal night lighting

agents.ego_description: Batman stands on elevated railway tracks using detective vision to scan the area

entered.detail: metal railway tracks on elevated bridge with wooden ties
large multi-story industrial building with scaffolding and illuminated windows
tall yellow construction cranes silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Batman stands on elevated railway tracks with detective vision active, casting everything in a green tint. The industrial district of Gotham lies ahead with a large complex and construction cranes visible against the stormy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated railway approach to industrial complex

agents.ego_description: Batman walks slowly along the railway tracks toward the industrial complex, cape flowing behind him

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying time 12:14 and advertisements in neon blue and orange

segments.scene_description: With detective vision deactivated, Batman walks along the elevated railway tracks toward the industrial complex. The scene reveals more detail of the construction cranes and a digital billboard comes into view on the right as the camera slowly advances.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a stylized tactical view into a detailed, atmospheric night scene in Gotham City. It begins with Batman standing on elevated railway tracks under a green detective vision overlay, overlooking an industrial district filled with construction cranes against a stormy sky. As the vision mode deactivates, the green tint vanishes to reveal the natural dark tones of the city while Batman begins walking forward along the tracks. The scene then expands to show the intricate details of the distant industrial complex and the towering cranes, before a glowing digital billboard emerges on the right as the camera slowly advances.
